results.label: Supabase access
results.remediation: Provide Supabase URL and service role key.

results.label: GHL access
results.remediation: Provide a non-rotating GHL PIT/access token.

results.label: GHL location exists
results.remediation: Verify location ID and GHL token scope.

results.label: Onboarding submission received
results.remediation: Generate link and submit/seed onboarding data.

results.label: Panel contact IDs known
results.remediation: Generate/submit onboarding link so contact IDs are recorded.

results.label: Domain connected / DNS configured
results.remediation: Connect DNS/custom domain and sync dominio_web; both are required for pass.

results.label: Phone number assigned in GHL
results.remediation: Assign GHL phone number and verify active phone-system account status.

results.label: Business email connected
results.remediation: Connect business email and set automation_sender_email; both are required for pass.

results.label: Landing page generated/published
results.remediation: Generate landing HTML/images and add GHL publication evidence.

results.label: Calendar configured
results.remediation: Create/verify both on-site and consultation calendars, then sync both booking custom values.

results.label: Stripe connected
results.remediation: Connect Stripe or confirm with stronger proof than the form flag.

results.label: Panel account approved
results.remediation: Approve account only after setup evidence passes.

results.label: Default staff permissions disabled
results.remediation: Run or verify default staff permission hardening for this location.

results.label: Core custom values
results.remediation: Run custom value sync after onboarding data is complete.

results.label: Landing custom values
results.remediation: Create missing custom values used by landing generator/published page.

results.label: Onboarding workflow present
results.remediation: Verify GHL workflow trigger tag ob-meeting-ok and webhook body in GHL UI.
